title: Human Task
description: A task that requires human input or action before agents can continue

id.description: Unique identifier in the form HTASK-<number>

title.description: Short one-line description of what the human needs to do

description.description: Full context and instructions for the human

requester.description: Agent name that created this human task

urgency.description: How urgently this task needs to be completed

unblocks.description: Task IDs that are blocked until this human task is resolved

status.description: Current state of the human task

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task was created

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the human completed this task (optional)
